personas.name: News Curator
personas.description: System-side AI agent responsible for creating and managing news content.

personas.name: News Reactor (User)
personas.description: The end-user who interacts with the news agent.

flows.flow_name: Generate News Videos (Triggered by First User in a 2-Hour Window)
actions: Mark the current user’s conv_id as the source conv_id.
Retrieve avatar IDs using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id}.
Assign one unique teacher avatar to each genre: Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Weather.
Generate a short placeholder script template: 'Hello, welcome to the news briefing. Here’s your quick update on [genre name].'
For each genre, fetch top news headlines using Google search queries (e.g., 'latest Politics news', 'latest Business news', etc.), extract summary content, and merge it with the placeholder script.
Generate one AI video per genre using the assigned avatar and compiled script.
Store all five videos under the source conv_id.
Mark the conv_id with status: queued and expiry: +2 hours.
Save metadata: conv_id, genre → avatar → video URL, generation timestamp, expiry timestamp.
flows.sub_goal: Create 5 genre-specific AI videos using teacher avatars and store them under the first user’s conv_id.

flows.flow_name: Deliver Videos to Any User Accessing Within 2-Hour Window
actions: When any user accesses the news agent, a new conv_id is automatically created for their session.
The system checks if a video set has already been generated in the current 2-hour window.
If no video set exists, the current user is identified as the first user and Flow 1 is triggered to generate videos.
If a video set already exists, the system does not generate new videos for this user.
It retrieves the latest source conv_id that is marked ready and belongs to the first user in the current 2-hour window.
The system fetches all 5 genre videos (Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Weather) linked to that conv_id.
The videos are presented in sequence, each narrated by its assigned teacher avatar.
All users accessing the agent within this window receive the exact same video set.
After 2 hours, the next user to access the agent becomes the new first user and starts a new content cycle.
flows.sub_goal: Retrieve and serve the same video set to all users using the conv_id of the first user in the current 2-hour cycle.

flows.flow_name: Deliver and Loop Pre-Synthesized News Videos (Triggered on User Access)
actions: When a user opens the news agent, a new conv_id is automatically created but no new videos are generated.
The system retrieves the source conv_id from the first user of the 2-hour block that is marked as ready.
It fetches all 5 pre-synthesized videos (Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Weather) linked to the source conv_id.
The videos are played in order, each presented by a unique teacher avatar.
After the 5th video ends, the system loops back to the first and continues indefinitely.
This looping experience remains active throughout the 2-hour session.
Once 2 hours pass, a new first user triggers the next video generation cycle and a new loop begins.
A video briefing is always available and playing whenever any user accesses the agent.
flows.sub_goal: Deliver the same 5-genre video briefing (from the first user's conv_id) to every user in the 2-hour window and loop it continuously after the final video.
